gold.rationale: 文中关于发布会公布的各版本“官方指导价”（如702 Max 20.38万元起）与智驾硬件更新存在现实依据，但把“20.38万元起”从特定版本指导价扩展为“黑白红新色/现车到店即可按该价交付”的叙述，弱化了版本与交付条件，容易让受众误以为新配色全系均为该起步价。配图中海报风“20.38万起”角标及车色效果存在明显编辑痕迹，且与“门店现车到店实拍/可按该价交付”的语境绑定不一致，构成图文语境错配与误导。

atomic_points.post_summary: 该帖子声称小鹏P7在3月18日的发布会上推出了黑、白、红三款新配色及车型升级，起步价为20.38万元，并详细列出了各版本价格、智驾芯片由Orin-X更换为图灵AI芯片的技术更新以及社交媒体上的相关热度。

visual_indicators.scene_description: 一张发布会现场照片，主体是一辆红色的小鹏P7轿车。背景是一个巨大的LED屏幕，显示着“黑白红新色上新”和“未来 AI 豪华轿跑”的标语，以及四个价格档位（20.38, 22.38, 24.38, 30.18万元）。背景中有一位模糊的演讲者。图片右下角叠加了“20.38万起”的价格标签。

顶部副标题“未来 AI 豪华轿跑”

visual_indicators.scene_description: 一张垂直排列的营销海报，分为三部分。第一部分展示红色P7，标题为“The Next P7 星曜骑士套装”，列出了专属外观色和轮毂等配置。第二部分展示黑色P7，标题为“The Next P7 暗夜骑士套装”，列出了专属外观色和内饰等配置。第三部分展示红色P7正面，标题为“The Next Design 极致未来感原创设计”。

retrieved_evidence.text:
未来AI豪华轿跑——小鹏P7再升级！
官方指导价：
·702 Max版：20.38万元
·820 Max版：22.38万元
·750 四驱 Max版：24.38万元
·750 四驱鹏翼 Ultra版：30.18万元
 加价干啊！⚡
小鹏P7为性能党量身打造了20寸起步的大直径轮毂，运动气场拉满！同步新增「运动+模式」，这价格你觉得怎么样#小鹏P7# ​​​

小鹏汽车在最新一轮产品发布中进一步细化了P7系列的官方指导价结构。除起售的702 Max版外，同系列还包括官方指导价为22.38万元的820 Max版、24.38万元的750四驱Max版，以及官方公布价格为30.18万元的750四驱鹏翼Ultra版。发布会介绍称，不同车型在续航里程、驱动形式以及配置水平上存在明显区分，旨在覆盖从主流家用到高阶智能出行等多层次需求。相关细节以现场公布的价格口径为准，后续销售政策仍待进一步明确。
小鹏P7作为小鹏汽车旗下中型纯电轿车，近日推出黑、白、红三种全新车身配色，其中“亮红色”被定位为更突出运动感与年轻化定位的主打色。据相关渠道的价格信息显示，新款车型起售价为20.38万元，并配合线上线下同步的上市宣传物料强调“黑白红新色”主题，强化该车在智能电动市场中的辨识度与品牌形象更新。

据小鹏汽车近期发布会介绍，小鹏P7新款在产品命名和版本结构上进行了调整，以Max系列作为主力配置梯队，包括702 Max、820 Max和750四驱Max等车型，并继续保留鹏翼Ultra作为顶配版本。现场信息显示，官方同时提到将新增Ultra SE版本，定位为中配智驾车型，在功能配置上介于Max系列与顶配Ultra之间。相关负责人称，此次版本重组意在简化选择逻辑，并在智能驾驶能力和舒适性配置之间提供更多层级选项，具体上市节奏尚未完全披露。

在智能驾驶配置方面，小鹏汽车于近日发布会上宣布，新款P7的智驾硬件方案进行了更新，核心计算平台由此前的Orin-X更换为图灵AI芯片，并同步引入被称为“第二代VLA”的相关技术方案。发布会信息显示，不同车型之间在芯片数量上存在差异：其中Ultra SE配备两颗图灵AI芯片，顶配Ultra则采用三颗芯片的配置，以对应更高等级的智能驾驶与感知能力。公司方面表示，各版本具体功能边界和后续软件升级路径将在车辆交付前后逐步向用户说明。

小鹏P7昨天的发布会给大家总结一下

主要是版本重构：以前都叫Ultra，现在精简为Max系列（702/820/750四驱），直降1.6万，702 Max仅20.38万起；新增了一个Ultra SE中配智驾版，Ultra顶配继续保留。

智驾换代：芯片从Orin-X换为图灵AI芯片，搭载第二代VLA；Ultra SE配2颗芯片，Ultra配3颗+VLM大模型，M ​​​
据小鹏汽车在近日举行的新款车型发布会上公布的信息，小鹏P7系列此次调整了产品与价格体系，其中入门款车型定为702 Max版，官方指导价为20.38万元。发布会现场介绍称，新车将面向今年下半年开始陆续交付，围绕续航表现与智能驾驶能力进行迭代升级。相关负责人表示，价格体系为目前阶段公布的指导水平，后续销售终端在具体优惠及金融方案方面或将根据市场情况作进一步安排。
小鹏汽车在发布小鹏P7新配色的同时，对产品版本结构与智驾硬件进行重构升级。据发布会要点总结，P7系列在Max、Ultra SE等配置上引入新命名或组合方案，并针对智能驾驶平台进行芯片与传感器替换优化，提升算力和感知能力。相关技术介绍指出，新硬件有助于强化城市智能辅助驾驶与高速导航辅助等功能，为后续OTA能力预留更大升级空间。
@罗永浩的十字路口 嘴臭的罗老师昨天说，什么时候能禁止人驾？以及我不屑于跟汽车媒体抢饭碗，因为代言费太高[泪奔][泪奔][泪奔]#罗永浩称P7智驾开得比何小鹏好##小鹏P7黑白红新色20.38万起# ​​​

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post's specific claims regarding pricing, trim levels, chip specifications, and color options are fully corroborated by the retrieved evidence, with no material discrepancies in facts, tone, or context.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post accurately reports the details of the XPeng P7 launch event, including pricing, technical specs, and visual elements, consistent with the provided evidence.

images.scene_description: A red XPeng P7 sedan is displayed on a stage with a large screen in the background showing pricing tiers. A presenter stands to the left. Large white text overlays the top of the image, and a semi-transparent price badge is overlaid on the bottom right corner.
images.v2_evidence: The image features large white headline text '黑白红新色上新' overlaid at the top and a semi-transparent price badge '20.38万起' overlaid at the bottom right, which are digital edits added to the original photo.
images.explanation: The image is a press photo of the launch event that has been edited with large text overlays and a price badge.

images.scene_description: A vertical marketing poster collage featuring three sections. The top shows a red car ('Starlight Knight Package'), the middle shows a black car ('Dark Knight Package'), and the bottom shows a front view of the red car. Each section has stylized text overlays describing the packages.
images.ocr_text: The Next P7 | 星曜骑士套装 | 专属星耀红外观色 | 专属20英寸六辐运动轮毂+烈焰红卡钳 | 可选引力红/熔岩灰内饰主题 | The Next P7 | 暗夜骑士套装 | 专属暗夜黑外观色 | 专属红色P7尾标 | The Next Design | 极致未来感原创设计 | XPENG
images.v1_evidence: The image is a composite marketing poster with stylized gradient backgrounds, glossy product renderings, and infographic-style text layouts that characterize synthetic or high-end commercial design rather than candid photography.
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite collage stitching together three different promotional shots with added text banners and headers for each section.
images.explanation: This is a stylized marketing poster collage illustrating the new color packages, fitting the description of 'official poster style' material.

image_analysis.global_notes: Both images are promotional materials related to the XPeng P7 launch. Image 1 is a press photo with added text overlays, while Image 2 is a designed marketing poster.

judge.level3_rationale: 尽管文本中关于小鹏P7的价格、配色及芯片升级等核心事实均与证据一致，但配图包含经过编辑的发布会照片及合成风格的营销海报（V1/V2），根据规则，存在合成视觉内容（V1）的帖子不能被评为“基本属实”，因此判定为“大部分虚假”。
judge.reasoning_trace: Text claims are fully supported. Image 1 has overlays (V2). Image 2 is a marketing poster (V1, V2). Rule: V1 present -> Not Mostly True. Rule: V1 alone -> At least Mostly False. Verdict: Mostly False.
judge.core_claim: 小鹏P7在3月18日发布会推出黑白红新配色及车型升级，起步价20.38万元，并更新了智驾芯片方案。
key_subclaims: 小鹏P7在3月18日发布会推出黑、白、红三款新配色。
新车起步价定为20.38万元，各版本价格分别为20.38万、22.38万、24.38万、30.18万。
智驾芯片由Orin-X更换为图灵AI芯片，Ultra SE配两颗，Ultra配三颗。
图片展示了发布会现场及官方宣传海报。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 小鹏P7在3月18日发布会推出黑、白、红三款新配色。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms the new colors and launch event.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 新车起步价定为20.38万元，各版本价格分别为20.38万、22.38万、24.38万、30.18万。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence explicitly lists these exact prices.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 智驾芯片由Orin-X更换为图灵AI芯片，Ultra SE配两颗，Ultra配三颗。
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms the chip change and specific counts.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图片展示了发布会现场及官方宣传海报。
subclaim_findings.note: Images match the description of the event and marketing materials.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post's core claims regarding pricing, colors, and technical specs are fully supported by the evidence. The only issues are visual: Image 1 has text overlays (V2) and Image 2 is a marketing composite (V1, V2). According to the rules, V1 alone triggers 'at least Mostly False'. However, the text is 100% accurate and the images are standard marketing materials for the product described, not misleading fabrications of the event itself. The 'V1' here refers to the stylized nature of the poster, not a fake event. Given the strict rule 'V1 alone -> at least Mostly False', I must apply it, but the 'Mostly False' definition requires the main conclusion to be wrong. Here the main conclusion is right. This is a conflict between the 'V1 rule' and the 'Mostly False definition'. Re-reading the 'Mostly False' definition: 'The post's main conclusion is wrong'. It is NOT wrong. The 'V1' rule is a heuristic for 'fabricated visuals presented as real'. A marketing poster is not 'presented as real' in the sense of a news photo, but the analyzer flagged it. Let's look at the 'Mixture' definition: 'Both a substantial true core AND a substantial misleading core'. The visual is not misleading, it's just a poster. The text is true. The 'V1' flag might be too aggressive for a standard poster. However, I must follow the analyzer's V1 flag if I can confirm it. The image IS a composite/stylized poster. Is it 'Synthetic Visual Content'? Yes. Does it make the post 'Mostly False'? No, because the text is true. The 'V1 alone -> Mostly False' rule is a hard constraint in the prompt ('NEVER predict Mostly True when V1...'). So I cannot predict Mostly True. Can I predict Mixture? Mixture requires 'substantial misleading core'. A poster is not misleading. This is a tricky case. Let's look at the 'False' definition. No. Let's look at 'Mostly False' again. 'Real elements exist but they are SUBORDINATE'. Here the text is the main element. The image is secondary. If the image is 'fake' (V1), does it dominate? No. But the rule says 'V1 alone -> at least Mostly False'. I will follow the rule. Wait, looking at Example 6: 'V1 alone + 3+ companions -> Mostly False'. Here I have V1 + V2 (2 labels). The rule says 'V1 alone -> at least Mostly False'. It doesn't say 'V1 + V2 -> Mostly False'. It says 'V1 alone' is sufficient. So V1+V2 is also sufficient. So the verdict MUST be Mostly False or False. Since the text is true, it's not False. So it must be Mostly False. This feels wrong semantically (the post is accurate), but the rules force it due to the V1 flag on the poster. Let me double check if I can drop V1. 'V1... YES when the image is wholly / partially AI-generated... marketing rendering'. The image IS a marketing rendering. So V1 is correct. The rule 'NEVER predict Mostly True when V1' is absolute. So I must drop to Mostly False. The reasoning is that the visual evidence is synthetic/stylized, which violates the 'True'/'Mostly True' criteria for visual authenticity in this dataset's strict rules, even if the text is accurate.

image_findings.explanation: Image 1 is a press photo with added text overlays ('黑白红新色上新', '20.38万起') which constitutes visual editing.
Image 2 is a composite marketing poster (synthetic visual content) stitching multiple promotional shots together.
